holes.name: LeanEval.GroupTheory.finite_group_isSolvable_of_card_eq_prime_pow_mul_prime_pow
holes.body:
theorem finite_group_isSolvable_of_card_eq_prime_pow_mul_prime_pow
    {G : Type*} [Group G] [Fintype G]
    {p q a b : ℕ}
    (hp : Nat.Prime p)
    (hq : Nat.Prime q)
    (hpq : p ≠ q)
    (hcard : Fintype.card G = p ^ a * q ^ b) :
    IsSolvable G := by
  sorry
